---
title: "Portugal was not awful after all"
author: "Håvard Strand"
description: ""
date: "2026-06-23 21:23:00"
categories: [Update]
---

# Portugal won

Portugal beat Uzbekistan. We were not surprised. Christian is 34 points ahead.

```{r standings, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(here::here("R", "plot_standings.R"))
this_match <- 47
lag        <- 1
plot_standings(this_match, lag)
```

```{r show, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("standings.png")
```

```{r scatter_points, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE , warning=FALSE}
source("../../R/group_stage_scatter.R")
plot_match(47, save = TRUE) 
```
